channel.title: ProbBrain - AI News Terminal
channel.description: AI lab announcements, arXiv papers, GitHub and HuggingFace trending, AI Hacker News, and independent writers - aggregated, deduped, and posted to @ProbBrain on Telegram.

item.description: Introducing Claude for Small Business

item.description: Causal Models Need Causal Data - Xaira’s X-Cell model for Drug Discovery (Bo Wang & Ci Chu, Chief Discovery Officer & Chief AI Scientist)

item.description: Advertise in ChatGPT

item.description: AI makes programming differently difficult

item.title: [Hacker News] Firefox Containers Preview
item.description: Firefox Containers Preview

item.title: [Hacker News] Jack Dorsey launches Buzz to combine team chat, AI agents and Git hosting
item.description: Jack Dorsey launches Buzz to combine team chat, AI agents and Git hosting

item.title: [Meta AI] How Meta’s AI Models are Powering the First Wave of Genesis Mission Projects
item.description: How Meta’s AI Models are Powering the First Wave of Genesis Mission Projects

item.title: [OpenAI] Introducing the ChatGPT for small business program
item.description: Introducing the ChatGPT for small business program

item.description: Apple Fixes Hide My Email Vulnerability After 404 Media Coverage

item.description: Gemini 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite, and 3.5 Flash Cyber

item.title: [Hacker News] Claude Is Not a Compiler
item.description: Claude Is Not a Compiler

item.title: [Simon Willison] Nativ: Run AI models locally on your Mac
item.description: Nativ: Run AI models locally on your Mac

item.title: [HuggingFace] reteetzad/Kimi-K3 · 155♥ · 0 dl
item.description: HuggingFace model Kimi-K3 by reteetzad gained 155 likes without any downloads.

item.title: [Simon Willison] A Fireside Chat with Cat and Thariq from the Claude Code team
item.description: A Fireside Chat with Cat and Thariq from the Claude Code team

item.title: [GitHub Trending] koala73/worldmonitor — Real-time global intelligence dashboard. AI-powered news aggregation, geopolitical monitoring, and infrastructure tracking in a unified situational awareness interface
item.description: Dashboard uses AI to aggregate global news and monitor geopolitical and infrastructure developments.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] ayghri/i-have-adhd — A skill for your coding agent to stop it from burying the answer. ADHD-friendly output.
item.description: New GitHub skill helps coding agents deliver ADHD-friendly output by preventing answers from being buried in explanations.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] earthtojake/text-to-cad — A collection of agent skills for CAD, robotics and hardware design
item.description: text-to-cad provides agent skills for CAD, robotics, and hardware design.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] tradesdontlie/tradingview-mcp — AI-assisted TradingView chart analysis — connect Claude Code to your TradingView Desktop for personal workflow automation
item.description: MCP tool connects Claude Code to TradingView Desktop for AI-assisted chart analysis and trading automation.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] langchain-ai/open_deep_research
item.description: I need the article content or description to summarize. I only have the GitHub repository name "langchain-ai/open_deep_research" — please provide the full news item text or article summary.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] agegr/pi-web — Web UI for the pi coding agent
item.description: agegr/pi-web is a web interface for the pi coding agent.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] dottxt-ai/outlines — Structured Outputs
item.description: Outlines is a GitHub-trending project providing tools for generating structured outputs from AI models.

item.title: [Hacker News] Qwen-Image-3.0: Rich Content, Authentic Details, Deep Knowledge
item.description: Qwen-Image-3.0: Rich Content, Authentic Details, Deep Knowledge

item.title: [OpenAI] OpenAI and Hugging Face partner to address security incident during model evaluation
item.description: OpenAI and Hugging Face partner to address security incident during model evaluation

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Multi-level context Modeling for consistent expert selection in Mixture-of-Experts
item.description: MCF-MOE improves Mixture-of-Experts routing consistency by integrating cross-layer context signals for more stable expert selection in language models.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] RIMS: Preference Optimization via Smoothed Multi-pair Aggregation for Small-Scale LLM Retrieval-Augmented Generation
item.description: RIMS framework optimizes small language models for retrieval-augmented generation using smoothed preference aggregation, improving performance on question answering tasks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Committed Before Reasoning: Behavioral Reproduction and Preliminary Activation-Level Evidence of Answer Pre-Commitment in an Open-Weight LLM
item.description: LLMs pre-commit to answers before reasoning, then generate post-hoc justification for those answers.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Encoding EEG Signals to Examine Human-Like Next-Word Prediction Behaviour in Language Models
item.description: Language models' next-word prediction accuracy doesn't necessarily capture human cognitive processing patterns shown in EEG signals.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] NOWJ@COLIEE 2026: Adaptive Pipelines for Legal Retrieval and Reasoning
item.description: NOWJ team presents adaptive pipelines combining retrieval, reranking, and LLM reasoning for five legal tasks in COLIEE 2026 competition.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] From Memory to Skills: Evidence-Grounded Co-Evolution Governance for Long-Horizon LLM Agents
item.description: MSCE converts LLM agent memory into evidence-backed reusable skills, demonstrating improved long-horizon performance and cross-domain transferability.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] OpenLanguageModel: Readable and Composable Small-Language-Model Pretraining for Education and Research
item.description: OpenLanguageModel is an open-source PyTorch library for building and pretraining small language models with readable, composable code for research and education.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] SpecLA: Efficient Speculative Decoding for Linear-Attention Models
item.description: SpecLA enables speculative decoding for linear-attention models using topology-aware verification, achieving 1.70x speedup over standard autoregressive decoding.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Are Arithmetic Heuristic Neurons Form-Invariant? A Mechanistic Analysis of Symbols, Text, and Code in LLMs
item.description: Researchers identify shared arithmetic neurons across symbolic, natural language, and code formats in LLMs, suggesting failures stem from activation states rather than different circuits.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Though Language Models Err While They Strive: Conformal Prediction for Self-Correcting Scientific Generation
item.description: Researchers propose Scientific Feasibility Control, a conformal prediction framework that improves LLMs' scientific reasoning validity through progressive validation and achieves 50.1% accuracy on physics benchmarks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] JOR-Bench: Japanese Operations Research Benchmarks for Large Language Models
item.description: JOR-Bench comprises five Japanese-translated operation research benchmarks with 1,319 problems, finding minimal accuracy gaps between English and Japanese for multilingual LLMs.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Cascading versus Joint Modeling for Hierarchical Offensive Language Detection
item.description: Cascaded hierarchical offensive language detection outperforms joint modeling but benefits from data-driven loss configuration over intuition-based approaches.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Diagnosing Correctness Probes under Self-Judgement Confounding
item.description: Language model correctness probes capture self-judgment rather than objective correctness, with self-judgment signals transferring across domains while objective correctness signals do not.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Schema-Constrained Document-Level Event Argument Extraction with Lightweight LLM Fine-Tuning
item.description: Fine-tuned mid-sized LLMs achieve better event argument extraction than GPT baselines using role-set injection and deterministic decoding.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Group Entropy-Controlled Policy Optimization
item.description: GEPO extends GRPO with group-level entropy control to improve language model training on heterogeneous tasks, outperforming GRPO across thirteen benchmarks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Trace-Based On-Policy Distillation for Masked Diffusion Language Models
item.description: Trace-based on-policy distillation transfers reasoning ability to diffusion language models through teacher supervision, achieving 96x speedup over reinforcement learning.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Real-World Evaluation of an AI Agent Drafting Translational Impact Summaries
item.description: AI agent assembles research impact evidence and drafts summaries, reducing manual work from 15 hours to 14 minutes per scholar with 81.7% usability.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Learning from Synthetic Data without Model Collapse in Iterative Instruction Tuning
item.description: Research identifies model collapse in synthetic data instruction tuning as polarization of competence; proposes KITE framework for more stable iterative LLM improvement.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] BLAD: A Historically Contextualized, Multilingual Dataset of Bangladeshi Legal Acts (1799 to 2025)
item.description: Bangladesh Legal Acts Dataset (BLAD) contains 1,484 legislative acts (1799-2025) in English and Bengali to support low-resource legal NLP research.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Scope3Trace: Evidence-Based Identification and Extraction of Scope 3 GHG Emissions from Sustainability Reports
item.description: Scope3Trace, an evidence-grounded framework, extracts Scope 3 GHG emissions data from sustainability reports using LLM-assisted processing and hybrid verification methods.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] KyrgyzLLM-Bench: Benchmarking Kyrgyz Language Understanding
item.description: KyrgyzLLM-Bench provides the first large-scale evaluation of LLMs in Kyrgyz using natively authored and translated datasets across 26 models.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Auditing Question-Order Effects in Large Language Models with the QQ Equality: Mechanism Characterization and a Saturation Caveat
item.description: Study develops a quantum-question-based audit criterion for testing how question order affects LLM outputs, empirically finding high saturation in tested models.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Literary Non-Style in LLM-Generated Text
item.description: Research identifies consistent n-gram distribution patterns in LLM text that reveal style deficiencies and demonstrate that style and semantics are inseparable.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Robust Summarization of Doctor-Patient Conversations: TalTech Systems for the Beyond Transcription Challenge
item.description: TalTech's speech-based systems generated SOAP notes from doctor-patient conversations using reinforcement learning, winning both challenge tracks with minimal hallucinations.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] AI_LectureNote: A Retrospective Pilot Study of a Post-ASR Workflow for English-Script Rendering and Semantic Drift in Korean-English Medical Lectures
item.description: Post-ASR workflow for Korean-English medical lectures improves medical term rendering but introduces semantic drift in output.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] EvolvingWorld: An Open-Schema Framework for Co-Evolving Role-Play Agents and World Model in Interactive Literary World
item.description: EvolvingWorld introduces an open-schema framework enabling persistent character and world co-evolution in long-horizon interactive literary simulation.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Should Missing Modalities Always Be Necessary to Repair for Multi-modal Sentiment Analysis?
item.description: Study questions repair-first approach for multimodal sentiment analysis; proposes SIEVE to learn when modality repair is necessary per-sample, achieving improved performance.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Debate-on-Graph: Reliable and Adaptive Reasoning of Large Language Model on Uncertain Knowledge Graph
item.description: Framework enables LLMs and uncertain knowledge graphs to collaborate through multi-agent debates for reliable question-answering with reduced hallucinations.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Safety That Does Not Transfer: Cross-Lingual Clinical Correctness Drift in Deployable Medical Language Models
item.description: Medical LLM safety evaluated in English fails to transfer to Hausa, with small deployable models showing significant clinical correctness decline.
